title: November 4
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|November|hide31=yes}}

'''November 4''' is the 308th day of the year (309th in leap years), with 57 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1910s#1918|1918]] – [[Art Carney]] is born.
*[[1975]] – [[John Callen]] is born.
*[[1992]] – [[Little Corvus]] is born.
*[[1997]] – ''[[The Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]'' published.
*[[1998]] – ''[[Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand 4]]'' published.
*1998 – ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron: The Warrior Princess (TPB)]]'' published.
*[[2003]] – [[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order|''The New Jedi Order'']] series ends with the release of ''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''.
*[[2008]] – [[Star Wars Insider 105|''Star Wars Insider'' 105]] published.
*[[2009]] – [[Invasion 5|''Invasion'' 5]] published.
*2009 – "[[Landing at Point Rain]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2011]] – "[[The General (episode)|The General]]" airs on Cartoon Network.
*[[2014]] – [[Tarkin (novel)|''Tarkin'']] published.
*[[2015]] – "[[Brothers of the Broken Horn]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*2015 – [[Star Wars (2015) 11|''Star Wars'' (2015) 11]] published.
*2015 – [[Star Wars Rebels Magazine 11|''Star Wars Rebels'' Magazine 11]] published in the United Kingdom.
*[[2018]] – "[[The Children from Tehar]]" airs on [[Disney Channel]].
*[[2020]] – [[Star Wars (2020) 8|''Star Wars'' (2020) 8]] published.
*2020 – ''[[Star Wars Adventures: Shadow of Vader's Castle]]'' published.
*[[2021]] – "[[Kowakian Monkey-Lizards (episode)|Kowakian Monkey-Lizards]]" premieres on the [[StarWarsKids.com|Star Wars Kids]] YouTube channel.
*2021 – "[[Mynocks (episode)|Mynocks]]" premieres on the Star Wars Kids YouTube channel.
*[[2025]] – ''[[Choices of One]]'' reprinted as part of ''The Essential Legends Collection''.
*2025 – ''[[Honor Among Thieves]]'' reprinted as part of ''The Essential Legends Collection''.
*2025 – ''[[Razor's Edge]]'' reprinted as part of ''The Essential Legends Collection''.
*2025 – ''[[Star Wars Legends: The Old Republic Omnibus Vol. 2]]'' published.
*2025 – ''[[Star Wars: The High Republic Adventures Volume 5 (Phase III)]]'' published.
*2025 – ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knights Vol. 1 – Guardians Of The Republic]]'' published.
<noinclude>
